examName: DUS - Specialty in Dentistry Entrance Exam
dashboard.motivation.1: A small step every day creates expert-level confidence.
dashboard.motivation.2: Consistency beats intensity; solve and review daily.
dashboard.motivation.3: Every explanation you read is a future point earned.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
profile.title: Profile
profile.rule2: At least 0.5 raw points from Basic or Clinical test are required.
profile.rule3: If this threshold is not met, score is not calculated.
calendar.title: Exam Calendar
calendar.note: 2026 is a transition year with two periods. From 2027 onward, one period is planned annually.
baseScores.title: Base Scores
baseScores.note1: The highest scores concentrate in Orthodontics and Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery.
baseScores.note2: In Anatolian universities, many departments are in the 60-63 score band.
baseScores.note3: Specialty training duration generally changes between 3 and 4 years depending on department.
